description_long: This is a rectangular table with a flat, dark-colored tabletop and four sturdy legs positioned at each corner. The legs are slightly rounded and appear to be made of a different, slightly lighter material than the tabletop, suggesting a two-tone design. The table has a minimalist, modern aesthetic with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or hardware. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for seating multiple people, making it ideal for communal or public use. The surface is smooth and likely finished with a protective coating, giving it a subtle sheen. This table would be well-suited for placement in urban parks, outdoor cafes, or public gathering spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular table with a dark, smooth tabletop and four rounded, sturdy legs. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow edge of the tabletop and two front legs, highlighting the table's width and leg placement.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tabletop and all four legs, emphasizing the table's rectangular shape and spacious surface.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite narrow edge and two rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the full length and all four legs from the other side.
